The Data Drop #040

One device changed everything.
This is every single one.

Every iPhone at proportional size. Scroll right. Watch it grow.

11 milestones that defined a generation

Base model vs most expensive, by year

From silver to cosmic orange

Every model. Every spec. Click any two to compare.

One interactive data story, every week. Free.
